title: Snopel
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the sergeant|another Imperial officer named [[Snopell]]}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Snopel_-_SWGTCG.jpg]] |name=Snopel |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Commando|Commando|Tansarii Point Station}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]{{GalaxiesAED}} did not specifically state which faction Snopel served during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], although given [[Gender/Legends|his]] later service to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], it was implied to have been with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]{{SWGTCG|set=Squadrons Over Corellia|scenario=House Pack-Up promotional scenario}} |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Look, I don't know when you arrived here, but I've had two weeks of orientation and I think I know what I'm doing…|Sergeant Snopel arguing with a subordinate|}} '''Snopel''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who, according to stories, likely served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] during the very beginning of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], he had become an [[Imperial shock trooper/Legends|Imperial shock trooper]], attained the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]], and became known as one of the best [[Commando/Legends|commando]] [[Teacher/Legends|trainers]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. During his service with the Empire, Snopel participated in the [[Battle of Talus]], helping to deploy [[Troop/Legends|troops]] in defense of the [[Talus Imperial Outpost|Imperial Outpost]] on [[Talus/Legends|Talus]]. However, his respectable career took a turn for the worse when he was placed in command of a [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bomber]] group tasked with [[Galactic Vacant Building Demolishing Movement|demolishing vacant homes]]. After he endangered the lives of hundreds of innocent citizens for refusing to abort a poorly planned [[Bomber/Legends|bombing]] mission, he was reassigned to [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]] in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]]. By then retired from his normal duties as an Imperial commando, Snopel nevertheless continued to impart his knowledge of commando combat techniques to prospective trainees. One such trainee was referred to him by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. Together with his trainee, he helped to fight the rampant crime aboard the [[Space station/Legends|space station]], and even helped to save its inhabitants from a [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] bombing attack. Snopel's reputation as a skilled commando allowed him the opportunity to contract his services to individuals in other parts of the galaxy. Whilst remaining on Tansarii Point Station, he supervised missions against the meddlesome [[Sand Pirates|sand pirates]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], and the invasive [[Mountain Poachers|mountain poachers]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. In achieving his aims, Snopel did not hesitate to encourage acts of extreme violence. However, as he got older, he became less willing to enter the fray of battle himself. ==Biography== ===Battle of Geonosis=== Stories had it that a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] by the name of Snopel fought on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] during the beginning of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' at the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]]{{GalaxiesAED}} did not specifically state which battle Snopel was involved in on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]. However, it did say that [[Gender/Legends|he]] fought during the ''beginning'' of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Furthermore, Snopel was added to the [[Star Wars video games|game]] in [[2005]], before the [[Second Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Second Battle of Geonosis]] was introduced to [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] in the [[2009]] episode of ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'', "[[Landing at Point Rain]]." This rules out the possibility of him actually being involved in the Second Battle of Geonosis. between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], most likely on the side of the Republic. ===Serving the Empire=== ====Battle of Talus==== Following the rise of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Snopel continued his military service, this [[Time/Legends|time]] as a [[Imperial shock trooper/Legends|shock trooper]] for the Empire during the course of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]The ''[[Squadrons Over Corellia]]'' [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|Dark Side]] campaign did not specify an exact [[Time/Legends|timeframe]] for the [[Battle of Talus]], however as the battle featured [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who was not involved with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] until the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], this article assumes that the battle took place sometime after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Snopel was stationed at the [[Talus Imperial Outpost|Imperial Outpost]] on [[Talus/Legends|Talus]] where he participated in a fierce [[Battle of Talus|battle]] that took place on the [[Double Worlds|world]]. During the course of the battle, a Rebel counterattack led by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Coret Bhan]] attempted to overrun the Imperial Outpost after the Empire retreated there following a failed initial assault on the Rebel's [[Talus base|secret Talusian base]]. Although they were wearied, the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Armed Forces]] had no choice but to defend themselves. Grabbing [[Helmet/Legends|helmets]] and [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]], all available [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] rushed to defend the outpost. For his part, Snopel made sure that all the forces were deployed correctly. Due to the efforts of Snopel and his fellow Imperial [[Troop/Legends|troops]], the Empire began to make headway against the Rebels, forcing Captain Bhan to give the order for the [[Alliance Military/Legends|Alliance forces]] to fall back. This success culminated in a second Imperial offensive the next [[Standard day/Legends|morning]]. This time, thanks to the arrival of reinforcement troops and [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]], the assault on the Rebel's secret base proved successful. However, despite the Empire's victory during the Battle of Talus,{{SWGTCG|set=Squadrons Over Corellia|scenario=Dark Side scenario campaign}} many key Alliance personnel managed to evacuate.{{SWGTCG|set=Squadrons Over Corellia|scenario=Light Side scenario campaign}} ====A Training Mission Gone Wrong==== {{Quote|Snopel, you must abort this mission! There are too many houses targeted!"
"Look, I don't know when you arrived here, but I've had two weeks of orientation and I think I know what I'm doing…"
"No, you're wrong! Send the abort code now!"
"Calm down now, I'll do no such thing.|An Imperial officer and Sergeant Snopel, shortly before their scuffle|}} [[File:Snopel.png|200px|thumb|Sergeant Snopel in the Ranged Combat Training Room aboard Tansarii Point Station]] As the Galactic Civil War intensified, the Empire began to fear that abandoned domiciles spread throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] could be used as safe houses and ambush points for Rebel insurgents. To combat this perceived threat, [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Braedic Ekirk]] contracted a small firm known as [[Galactic Vacant Building Demolitions]] to [[Galactic Vacant Building Demolishing Movement|demolish countless vacant structures]] on the Empire's many [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] through means of aerial bombardment.{{SonyCite|url=en_US/players/content.vm?id=66958|text="Move It or Lose It"|int=Move It or Lose It}} However, Imperial regional commands had also turned the opportunity to destroy deserted houses into a training exercise for [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bomber]] groups. At one such [[Bomber/Legends|bomber]] command center, the usual training [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] was not able to attend that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], and was replaced by Snopel. Although he was by now recognized as a [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]], and as a distinguished [[Commando/Legends|commando]] [[Teacher/Legends|trainer]] and [[Non-commissioned officer/Legends|non-commissioned officer]], Snopel seemed out of his element commanding a [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] bomber group. Nevertheless, the TIEs left properly on schedule and in formation, vectored towards the houses they were assigned to destroy. Meanwhile, one of Sergeant Snopel's subordinates tracked their progress with the help of a large [[Holoprojector/Legends|holoprojector]] in the command center. Soon, the Imperial subordinate noticed that something was wrong. All of the houses were targeted for demolition, not just the empty ones. Recognizing this critical oversight, the subordinate pleaded with the sergeant to abort the mission. However, Snopel was unfazed by these protests. The sergeant casually swiveled his chair to face the junior Imperial, and insisted that his two [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] of orientation were enough to know how to do his job. The [[Military rank/Legends|lower-ranked]] Imperial persisted, exclaiming to Snopel that he was wrong, and that he needed to send out the abort code immediately. Snopel, set in his ways, refused to carry out such a command. When it became apparent that hundreds of innocent citizens could be [[Death/Legends|killed]], the junior Imperial headed towards the [[Comm unit/Legends|comm console]] to send the abort code personally. When Snopel blocked the way and grabbed the Imperial's [[Limb/Legends|arm]], a [[Unarmed combat/Legends|scuffle]] ensued between the two [[Officer/Legends|officers]]. After a brief struggle, the subordinate officer managed to subdue Snopel, and threw him in the brig. The abort code was then sent out to the bomber group, saving countless lives in the process. When the embarrassing situation was later explained to their superiors, a decision was made to reassign Snopel to [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]] in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]]. The disgraced [[Army/Legends|army]] officer was never to be allowed in an Imperial facility again. ===Reassignment to Tansarii Point Station=== ====Fighting the Hutts==== {{Quote|You want to talk to Sgt. Snopel in the Ranged Combat Training Room. He only teaches those with potential. I'll give you a waypoint.|Han Solo, to an aspiring commando|audio=vo-han-solo-17c.flac|{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|You Need Work|Tansarii Point Station}}}} By the time he was reassigned to the Ranged Combat Training Room of Tansarii Point Station, Snopel had retired from his career as an Imperial commando. However, he continued to wear his distinctive [[Color/Legends|black-colored]] shock trooper [[Armor/Legends|armor]], and he still bore the rank of sergeant. Despite his retirement, Snopel made good use of his time on the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] by showing a great many trainees the basic techniques a commando used in the field.{{SWGTCG|set=Squadrons Over Corellia|cardname=Sergeant Snopel}} {{Gamemechanics|Star Wars Galaxies}} One such trainee was referred to him by none other than [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], the famed Rebel Alliance [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. Snopel was willing to teach the new recruit the basics of becoming an effective commando. To that end, Snopel decided to test the trainee's abilities by having the individual resolve a problematic situation in the lower level of Tansarii Point Station. [[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt]] thugs began to cause a ruckus by punching a hole in the station and infiltrating the lower level. Snopel remarked he was getting too old to put a stop to them himself, and needed his trainee to take care of it. Sergeant Snopel handed over to his trainee an arsenal of [[C12 fragmentation grenade]]s. The trainee then headed down to the "Storage 02" room and lobbed a [[Grenade/Legends|grenade]], killing three thugs loyal to the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]. Snopel believed that this would be sufficient enough to send a message. ====Stopping Terry==== {{Quote|I have just learned that there was a shipment recently delivered that may be useful to my superiors. I need you to find one named Terry. He has a record of the shipment in his datapad. Recover that datapad by any means necessary. I want no witnesses.|Sergeant Snopel, to a commando|}} After injecting a small semblance of order to the lower level, Snopel soon learned that a shipment recently delivered to the station may be useful to his superiors. Snopel tasked his trainee with finding a dock worker named [[Terry]]. According to the grizzled sergeant, Terry possessed a record of the shipment in his [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]]. Snopel asked the trainee to retrieve the datapad with extreme violence, and to leave no witnesses. The commando trainee located Terry in the station's upper atrium and killed him, but the datapad contained no mention of the shipment. But Snopel did learn that Terry had planted a [[Bomb/Legends|bomb]] in the upper level of the station. Snopel urged his trainee to immediately stop the bomb from detonating. With no time to waste, Snopel suggested to the trainee via [[Comlink/Legends|communicator]] message to search one of the back rooms. The trainee soon found the explosive device, and defused it successfully. The trainee then returned to Snopel to inform the anxiously awaiting sergeant of the good news. Sergeant Snopel was deeply grateful to his trainee for saving him and the lives of everyone else on the station. As a show of gratitude, Snopel bestowed to his trainee a lump sum of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], a [[Sniper/Legends|sharpshooter's]] [[Bandolier/Legends|bandolier]], and a package containing a commando's [[Clothing/Legends|uniform]]. ====Focused Destruction==== {{Quote|Sgt. Snopel sent me to you."
"Of course he did. I have a job for you. Won't be too easy, but shouldn't kill ya either. A bunch of sand pirates are interfering with my business partners.|A commando and Coris Mao|{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Commando|Focused Destruction|Tatooine}}}} For the time being, Snopel had no more assignments for his novice commando, but it would not be the last time the two worked together. Although Snopel would remain on Tansarii Point Station, he at times became involved in supervising missions against various criminal elements throughout the galaxy. One such criminal organization was the [[Sand Pirates|sand pirates]], a group of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] which operated a [[Sand Pirate Base|base]] on a hilltop overlooking [[Mos Entha/Legends|Mos Entha]], a major [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] world of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. To destroy the pirates, Snopel sent his commando marching orders to meet with a man named [[Coris Mao]] in Mos Entha. Mao explained to the commando that the sand pirates were interfering with his business partners by attacking any [[Transport/Legends|transport]] that neared their base. To put a stop to this, Mao requested that Sergeant Snopel's loyal commando infiltrate their base, kill their leader, and ensure that no one could use the base again. The commando carried out the mission dutifully, first by killing two guards at the base's entrance, and then by eliminating at least ten other pirate's within the confines of the base. At the base's lowest level, the commando encountered and killed the boss of the sand pirates. Snopel congratulated the commando via comm message, but there was still one more thing left to do. To ensure that the base could not be used in the near future, Snopel told the commando to overload the [[Reactor/Legends|reactor]] and get out. Snopel did not know how long the main reactor would last once overloaded, but the commando carried out this objective as instructed and quickly vacated the base. Snopel was impressed that the commando had carried out the mission so cleanly. He informed the commando that he had already sent payment to Coris Mao, and that the commando should head back to him in Mos Entha to receive it. In addition to the credit payout, Coris Mao also bestowed to the commando a [[diffusion generator]]. ====Clearing the Trash==== {{Quote|I got a job for you. Some folk took possession of a base and the owners want it back. The new owners don't seem willing to let them take it back. Help them see reason.|Sergeant Snopel's attack orders to a commando|{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Commando|Clearing the Trash|Naboo}}}} As one final mission to the now more seasoned commando, Sergeant Snopel sent attack orders to clear out an [[Mountain poacher bunker|occupied bunker]] in the [[Gallo Mountains/Legends|Gallo Mountains]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. The bunker, not located far from the [[Zaprin Estate]], was once owned by a group of [[Mining/Legends|mining]] professionals. However, a violent group of [[Mountain Poachers|mountain poachers]] forcefully took over the bunker with the help of their trained [[Narglatch/Legends|narglatch]] [[Species/Legends|creatures]]. The owners wanted it back, so they turned to Snopel and the contracted services of his junior commando to help the [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] poachers "see reason." Sergeant Snopel's commando traveled to Naboo and approached the captured bunker. The mission objectives were simple. Snopel needed the commando to kill the inhabitants, and reset the locks by accessing three of the bunker's [[Computer/Legends|computer]] terminals. The commando succeeded in doing so, and received the requisite congratulations from Snopel via comm message. Snopel then instructed the loyal commando to travel to Naboo's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Theed/Legends|Theed]] to meet with a man named [[Galuf Cardaan]] for payment. With that, Snopel ended communications. Galuf Cardaan was grateful for the services rendered by Snopel and his faithful associate. With the mountain poachers cleared out, he and his mining partners planned on moving back into the bunker in the near future. {{Endgame}} ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Are you a new recruit? Stand at attention when speaking to a superior, soldier!"
"Yes, sir!|Sergeant Snopel and a commando|}} Over the course of two [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]],According to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] began in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. As the events of ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' took place after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], this indicates that Snopel had participated in some form of military service for over two [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]]. Snopel had cultivated a distinguished career as a soldier during both the Clone Wars and the Galactic Civil War. During his time with the Galactic Empire, he acquired the rank of sergeant in the Imperial Army, and demonstrated his prowess as a superior commando trainer. When it came to the battlefield, he exhibited the kind of leadership that helped the Empire achieve victory during the Battle of Talus. When wearied Imperial troops were caught unprepared by a relentless Rebel counterattack, Snopel ensured that the Imperial defenders were deployed correctly. On the other hand, Snopel was out of his element when it came to commanding a TIE bomber group of rookie [[TIE pilot|pilots]]. Over time, he had become set in his ways, and unwilling to listen to reason. This personality flaw came to head when Sergeant Snopel refused to abort a simple training mission gone horribly wrong. In the face of Snopel's cavalier attitude, stubbornness and ineptitude, one of his subordinates scuffled with him in order to prevent the bombers from carrying out a mission that could have killed hundreds of innocent lives. Snopel's lapse in judgment resulted in him being reassigned to a less than glamorous post on Tansarii Point Station, compelling him to retire from his normal duties as an Imperial commando. Regardless, he retained the rank of sergeant and continued to proudly wear his black-colored shock trooper armor. Snopel made the most of his new post by showing a great many trainees the basic combat techniques used by commandos on the battlefield. Demanding respect and discipline from his soldiers, he did not hesitate to use extreme violence to achieve his objectives. To fight the rampant crime aboard the space station, he instructed a novice commando to lob a grenade in one of the lower storage rooms, killing three thugs. He believed excessive gestures such as these were necessary to send a message. He also worked with the same commando to ruthlessly kill a dock worker named Terry. However, as it turned out, Terry was a in fact a violent [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] himself who had planted an explosive device in the station's upper atrium. Under Snopel's direction, the commando trainee managed to defuse the bomb, saving the station and its inhabitants from certain destruction. Despite his seasoned experience on the battlefield, the bomb scare left Snopel feeling at least somewhat anxious. He was thankful to the novice commando for saving his life, and in recognition, Snopel gifted to the commando a brand new uniform. By this point in time, Snopel felt he was getting too old to take part in such adventurous ordeals himself. Yet he continued to thrive well enough at his more supervisory role from the confines of Tansarii Point Station. When sand pirates harassed business partners of Coris Mao, Snopel encouraged the same gung-ho acts of violence previously employed on Tansarii. He even went so far as to recommend overloading the Sand Pirate Base's main reactor, despite not knowing if the junior commando would have enough time to escape. Regardless, Snopel recognized talent, and was impressed that the commando had completed the mission against the sand pirates with a "minimum of mess." He would excitedly congratulate the junior commando for completing missions such as these, and go out of his way to ensure the commando received ample compensation for a job well done. ==Equipment== {{Quote|The life of a commando is full of fun tactics and loud weapons.|Sergeant Snopel|}} During the course of his service with the Galactic Empire, Sergeant Snopel wore black shock trooper armor fashioned with dark, blue-colored [[Kama/Legends|kamas]]. In terms of weaponry, Snopel possessed an arsenal of C12 fragmentation grenades which he bestowed upon a trainee for use against the thugs of Tansarii Point Station. Otherwise, Snopel was unarmed, at least during his time as a instructor aboard the space station. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|To use the grenade, press the corresponding hotbar key, ''(button 6)'', to queue the grenade attack into your special attack slot. Once that is done, you can right-click once your cursor is hovered over an enemy, ''(your cursor will turn red)'', and you will toss the grenade at that enemy.|Sergeant Snopel providing game mechanic information to the player as part of a tutorial|}} Snopel was a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Roleplaying game|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}} He was added to the game with the release of [[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15 2005|Publish 25's]] "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]" (NGE) on [[November 15]], [[2005]], which included a [[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]] featuring [[W:c:swg:Tansarii Point Station|Tansarii Point Station]].{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}} An [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] with a similar name, [[Warrant Officer/Legends|Warrant Officer]] [[Snopell]], was already present in the pre-NGE tutorial.{{SWGcite|exp=RotW|type=other|Publish 17: "New Player Tutorial"}} During the tutorial, Sergeant Snopel could be found in the station's Ranged Combat Training Room where he would give a [[W:c:swg:Quest|quest]] to players who pursued the [[W:c:swg:Commando|commando]] [[W:c:swg:Profession|profession]]. The quest required the player to kill three Hutt thugs in the station's lower level with a C12 fragmentation [[W:c:swg:Grenade|grenade]]. After completing this task, players were then required to kill an NPC named Terry and defuse a bomb in the upper level of the station. Completing these objectives awarded the player 500 [[W:c:swg:Imperial Credit|credits]], a worn sharpshooter's [[W:c:swg:Bandolier|bandolier]], and a standard issue [[W:c:swg:Clothing|uniform]] package. As they gained [[W:c:swg:Combat|combat]] [[W:c:swg:Experience Status|experience]], players of the commando profession would receive an item called Marching Orders once reaching [[W:c:swg:Commando Fundamentals V|Commando Fundamentals V]] at [[W:c:swg:Combat Level|level 14]]. Using this item would activate a quest titled ''Focused Destruction'', in which Snopel supervised a mission to kill multiple sand pirates and destroy a reactor in their base near [[W:c:swg:Mos Entha|Mos Entha]] on [[W:c:swg:Tatooine|Tatooine]]. Completing that quest would earn the player 5000 credits and a diffusion generator. Once reaching [[W:c:swg:Commando Essentials II|Commando Essentials II]] at level 26, players would receive yet another item called Attack Orders. Using this item would activate another quest titled ''Clearing the Trash'', in which Snopel would supervise a mission to clear out and hack into a bunker taken over by mountain poachers on [[W:c:swg:Naboo|Naboo]]. Completing that quest would earn the player 9500 credits and the choice of either a [[Special forces/Legends|Special Forces]] [[DL-18 Blaster Pistol|D-18]] or a [[Laser carbine|Conscript Carbine]]. Following the release of the ''[[Star Wars Galaxies Trading Card Game]]'' expansion ''[[Squadrons Over Corellia]]'', players could participate in the House Pack-Up promotional scenario from [[March 3]], [[2009]] through [[March 31]], 2009. Completing this scenario allowed players the opportunity to win at least one promotional card featuring an illustration of Sergeant Snopel,{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=68237&month=032009|text=''YOU'RE NOT FINISHED WITH HOUSE PACK UP UNTIL YOU GET SOME GREAT LOOT IN THE STAR WARS GALAXIES™ TRADING CARD GAME!''}} the artwork for which was completed by [[Kieran Yanner]].{{SonyCite|url=tradingcardgame/help/credits.vm|text=''Star Wars Galaxies'' TCG Credits}} Snopel also made a brief appearance in the storyline of the Dark Side scenario campaign for [[W:c:swg:Squadrons Over Corellia|''Squadrons Over Corellia'']], where Snopel was described as being responsible for making sure troops were deployed correctly at one point during the Battle of [[W:c:swg:Talus|Talus]]. ==Appearances== *{{SWGTCG|set=Squadrons Over Corellia|scenario=House Pack-Up promotional scenario}} *{{SWGTCG|set=Squadrons Over Corellia|scenario=Dark Side scenario campaign}} *{{GalaxiesNGE}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{SWGTCG|set=Squadrons Over Corellia|cardname=Sergeant Snopel}} *{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=68237&month=032009|text=''YOU'RE NOT FINISHED WITH HOUSE PACK UP UNTIL YOU GET SOME GREAT LOOT IN THE STAR WARS GALAXIES™ TRADING CARD GAME!''}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Snopel}} {{ScrollBox|content={{Reflist}}}} ==External links== *{{SWGWiki|Commando (quest)|Commando}} [[Category:Galactic Republic military personnel]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial shock troopers]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Stormtrooper officers of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Tansarii Point Station residents]]
